career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'xAI Grok Imagine API - the #1 Video Model, Best Pricing a...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on Google, DeepMind, xAI, Gemini

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) covers Google, DeepMind, xAI, Gemini -- no overt promotional language, but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'xAI Grok Imagine API - the #1 Video Model, Best Pricing a...' -- not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) on Google/DeepMind topics -- insufficient history to assess
